Yeah, what you're saying totally makes sense — we’ve realized that issue too.<:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>

There are more and more players now (that makes us super happy), and the community's got more and more stuff to handle. All kinds of issues are starting to pop up more and more (we've put 'em on the to-do list, just haven't had a chance to go through 'em one by one yet).

As for sharing dev stuff in advance, we're still looking for a way to do it that actually works.
✅「Answered」Another ani, another drama
I just checked Liz on my account.The multiplier for Green Flame at level 3 is 0.21.<:Brown_think:1459080117308620996>
✅「Answered」Liz' Corrupted Flames generated from her Soulforge scales with Exalt level ?

Sorry, I typed the wrong number <:takenotes:1357186646294138890> 

You can see the Corrupted Flames and the Green Flames in my hand have different damage values. 

A lv60 Liz with lv5 Soulforge has 171 ATK and 25% base damage bonus to Green/Corrupted/Deadly Flames. My Liz has a level 2 Exalt and a level 3 Green Flames (as you can see on the first screenshot)

A level 2 Green Flames has a 0.18 multiplier, a level 3 has a 0.21 multiplier.

171 * 0.18 * 1.25 = 38.4, rounded up to 39, just like the Corrupted Flames.

171 * 0.21 * 1.25 = 44.8, rounded up to 45, just like the Green Flames.

You can try yourself by using Liz supports with Exalt level =/= Green Flames level, and then one with Exalt level = Green Flames level.
Oh no worries at all! I'll take a closer look at the numbers issue.
I can try and record me showcasing how the generated Corrupted Flames damage increases as you level up Liz' Exalt if that makes it easier to see <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
💭「Processing」Liz' Corrupted Flames generated from her Soulforge scales with Exalt level ?
Just checked with the team: the Corrupted Flame generated by Soulforge Aptitude is the Awakener's own abilities, so it is tied to Exalt.
✅「Answered」Liz' Corrupted Flames generated from her Soulforge scales with Exalt level ?

Ok, so that's intended, then. Feels a bit weird, but sure ! It could be a good idea to mention that somewhere in-game, maybe in Liz' Soulforge or something ?

Thanks for confirming <:pray:1356053116260454534>
Maybe there'll be some tweaks later on, but for now we're not adding this kind of note.<:dishes:1356083313063759922>

Bump

Based on what everyone's been discussing, the main points are these two, right<:Brown_think:1459080117308620996> ?
1. Either separate the banners or boost the rates / pity on the combined banner.
2. Change "daily rotation" to "pick your own each day."
I'll pass that along to my team.

As for resources: before May 30th rolls around, you'll be able to get 100 pulls.
They should just make it like PGR rerun banners where it's a shared pity banner but you select your rate-up target
and can lose your rate up to any of the rerunning characters or standard units

That's basically it, the short duration of the banners making it harder for players to get what they want, and the rates compared to normal banners.

The resources are an issue because the last 150 pulls (from both the regular and paid event rewards) aren't available until after many of the reruns will have already ended. If the reruns became selectable that would no longer be a problem, but as it is now a lot of the pulls being given or sold for the event can't be used for many of the reruns.
